lines.english: But without the Naam, mortals burn in egotism. ||3||
Those who are imbued with the Naam find everlasting peace.
Through the Perfect Guru, it is obtained.
By great good furtune, some contemplate the Lord's Name.
Through the Lord's Name, all sorrows are eradicated.
He dwells within the heart, and pervades the external universe as well.
O Nanak, the Creator Lord knows all. ||4||12||
I am just a worm, created by You, O Lord.
Basant, Third Mehl, Ek-Thukay:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਲਗਉ ਪਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har jap har kai lgau paae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditating on the Lord, I fall at the Lord's Feet. ||1||Pause||
If you bless me, then I chant Your Primal Mantra. ||1||
I chant and reflect on His Glorious Virtues, O my mother.
When the Guru granted His Grace, my egotism was eradicated,
By Guru's Grace, I am addicted to the favor of the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
Why waste your life in hatred, vengeance and conflict? ||2||
The most lofty and exalted occupation is to contemplate the Word of the Shabad.
and then, I obtained the Lord's Name with intuitive ease. ||3||
Nanak chants the True Name. ||4||1||13||
The season of spring has come, and all the plants have blossomed forth.
This mind blossoms forth, in association with the True Guru. ||1||
Basant, Third Mehl:
This mind blossoms forth, and I am in ecstasy.
So meditate on the True Lord, O my foolish mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਂ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: taan sukh paavahu mere manaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Only then shall you find peace, O my mind. ||1||Pause||
Everyone speaks and says that the Lord is the One and Only.
I am blessed with the Ambrosial Fruit of the Naam, the Name of the Lord of the Universe. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਖਣੁ ਵੇਖਣੁ ਸਭੁ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਤੇ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੨॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: aakhan vekhan sabh saahib te hoe |4|2|14|
lines.english: All speech and insight comes from our Lord and Master. ||4||2||14||
By understanding the Hukam of His Command, we come to know the One Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਕਹੈ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: kehat naanak haumai kahai na koe |
lines.english: Says Nanak, no one can describe the Lord by speaking through ego.
Meeting with the True Guru, one's intellect is awakened. ||1||
O Dear Lord, please blend me with Yourself;
All the ages were created by You, O Lord.
Basant, Third Mehl:
When the mind is in spring, all people are rejuvenated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਚ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad sach naam samaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: let me merge in the True Name, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||1||Pause||
Contemplating the Word of the Guru's Shabad, one is in spring forever,

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਲਹਿ ਫੁਲੀਅਹਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: faleh fuleeeh raam naam sukh hoe |2|
lines.english: Blossoming forth and flowering through the Lord's Name, peace is obtained. ||2||
with the Lord's Name enshrined in the heart. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਬਸੰਤੁ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਹਰਿਆ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: man basant tan man hariaa hoe |
lines.english: When the mind is in spring, the body and mind are rejuvenated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਇਹੁ ਤਨੁ ਬਿਰਖੁ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਏ ਸੋਇ ॥੪॥੩॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: naanak ihu tan birakh raam naam fal paae soe |4|3|15|
lines.english: O Nanak, this body is the tree which bears the fruit of the Lord's Name. ||4||3||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਮਨ ਕਉ ਬਸੰਤ ਕੀ ਲਗੈ ਨ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: eis man kau basant kee lagai na soe |
lines.english: This mind is not even touched by spring.
Basant, Third Mehl:
They come to worship the Lord with devotion, through their perfect destiny. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨੑ ਬਸੰਤੁ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tina basant jo har gun gaae |
lines.english: They alone are in the spring season, who sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਧੰਧੈ ਬਾਂਧਾ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man dhandhai baandhaa karam kamaae |
lines.english: This mind is entangled in worldly affairs, creating more and more karma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਜਲਿਆ ਦੂਜੈ ਦੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man jaliaa doojai doe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: This mind is burnt by duality and double-mindedness. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਛੂਟੈ ਜਾਂ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟੈ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man chhoottai jaan satigur bhettai |
lines.english: This mind is released, only when it meets with the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕਾਲ ਕੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਨ ਫੇਟੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jamakaal kee fir aavai na fettai |3|
lines.english: Then, it does not suffer beatings by the Messenger of Death. ||3||
Enchanted by Maya, it cries out in suffering forever. ||2||
O Nanak, attachment to Maya is burnt away through the Word of the Shabad. ||4||4||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਛੂਟਾ ਗੁਰਿ ਲੀਆ ਛਡਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man chhoottaa gur leea chhaddaae |
lines.english: This mind is released, when the Guru emancipates it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹਿ ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਫੂਲਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ehi jeea jant fooleh har chit laae |1|
lines.english: These beings and creatures blossom forth when they focus their consciousness on the Lord. ||1||
Basant, Third Mehl:
Spring has come, and all the plants are flowering.
